_comment: DO NOT EDIT: FILE GENERATED AUTOMATICALLY BY PTERODACTYL PANEL - PTERODACTYL.IO
name: Better Than Wolves CE
author: phantomic12
description:
Better Than Wolves Community Edition server. Minecraft 1.6.4 with Legacy Fabric loader and the official BTWCE 3.1.0 mod from Modrinth.
Wiki: https://wiki.btwce.com/view/3.0.0_Beta
Mod: https://modrinth.com/mod/btwce

installation.script:
#!/bin/bash
# Better Than Wolves CE - Pterodactyl Egg Installation Script
# Minecraft 1.6.4 + Legacy Fabric + BTWCE 3.x
# Server Files: /mnt/server

apt-get update
apt-get install -y curl jq unzip wget dos2unix
mkdir -p /mnt/server
cd /mnt/server

# Step 1: Download the Legacy Fabric installer
echo "Downloading Legacy Fabric Installer..."
curl -sSL -o lf-installer.jar \
  "https://maven.legacyfabric.net/net/legacyfabric/fabric-installer/0.11.1/fabric-installer-0.11.1.jar"

# Step 2: Run installer in server mode with BTWCE-required loader (0.15.11)
# Wiki note: BTWCE 3.0+ requires Legacy Fabric 0.15.x (NOT 0.16+)
echo "Running Legacy Fabric Installer (server, MC ${MC_VERSION}, loader 0.15.11)..."
java -jar lf-installer.jar server -dir . -mcversion ${MC_VERSION} -loader 0.15.11 -downloadMinecraft

if [ ! -f fabric-server-launch.jar ]; then
  echo "WARNING: fabric-server-launch.jar was not created."
  echo "Listing jars in /mnt/server:"
  ls -la *.jar 2>/dev/null || true
  SERVER_JAR=$(find . -maxdepth 1 -name '*.jar' -not -name 'lf-installer.jar' -not -name '*.jar.*' | head -1)
  if [ -n "$SERVER_JAR" ]; then
    cp "$SERVER_JAR" fabric-server-launch.jar
    echo "Copied $SERVER_JAR to fabric-server-launch.jar"
  else
    echo "ERROR: No server jar found. The legacyfabric.net maven may be temporarily unavailable."
    echo "Try reinstalling in a few minutes."
    exit 1
  fi
fi

# Step 3: Create mods folder and download the BTWCE mod from Modrinth
mkdir -p mods

if ! ls mods/btwce-*.jar 1> /dev/null 2>&1; then
  echo "Downloading BTWCE ${BTWCE_VERSION} from Modrinth..."
  BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
    | jq -r --arg v "${BTWCE_VERSION}" '.[] | select(.version_number == $v) | .files[0].url' \
    | head -1)
  if [ -z "$BTW_URL" ] || [ "$BTW_URL" = "null" ]; then
    echo "Requested version '${BTWCE_VERSION}' not found, falling back to latest release..."
    BTW_URL=$(curl -sSL "https://api.modrinth.com/v2/project/btwce/version" \
      | jq -r '[.[] | select(.version_type == "release")][0].files[0].url')
  fi
  if [ -n "$BTW_URL" ] && [ "$BTW_URL" != "null" ]; then
    curl -sSL -o mods/btwce-mod.jar "$BTW_URL"
    echo "Downloaded BTWCE: $BTW_URL"
  else
    echo "ERROR: Could not download BTWCE mod from Modrinth."
    exit 1
  fi
fi

# Step 4: Accept EULA
echo "eula=true" > eula.txt

# Step 5: Create default server.properties if missing
if [ ! -f server.properties ]; then
  cat > server.properties <<'SPROPS'
#Minecraft server properties
level-name=world
server-port=25565
level-seed=
gamemode=survival
max-players=20
motd=BTW CE Server
spawn-protection=16
online-mode=true
white-list=false
level-type=default
difficulty=2
allow-nether=true
spawn-monsters=true
spawn-animals=true
view-distance=10
tick-time=60000
SPROPS
  dos2unix server.properties 2>/dev/null || true
fi

# Step 6: Clean up installer
rm -f lf-installer.jar

echo ""
echo "====================================="
echo "  Better Than Wolves CE installed!"
echo "====================================="
echo "Minecraft: ${MC_VERSION}"
echo "Loader: Legacy Fabric 0.15.11"
echo "BTWCE: ${BTWCE_VERSION}"
echo "Server jar: fabric-server-launch.jar"
echo "Mods folder contents:"
ls -la mods/ 2>/dev/null || echo "  (empty)"
echo ""

variables.name: Minimum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The minimum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Maximum Heap Memory (MB)
variables.description: The maximum amount of RAM in megabytes allocated to the Java Virtual Machine.

variables.name: Minecraft Version
variables.description: The Minecraft version to install. BTWCE 3.x requires 1.6.4.

variables.name: BTWCE Version
variables.description: The BTWCE mod version to install (from Modrinth). Use 'latest' for newest release, or pin a specific version like 3.1.0.

variables.name: MOTD
variables.description: The message shown in the server list.
variables.default_value: A Better Than Wolves CE Server

variables.name: Online Mode
variables.description: Verify players against Mojang accounts. Set to false to allow cracked/offline clients.
